calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of And Request For Prove-Up Hearing For Entry Of Court Judgment Or, Alternatively, Entry Of Court Judgment On The Papers
Off Calendar Aug-14-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Mohammad Walizadeh, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, STAR-WEST METREON, LLC., a Delaware limited liability company.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) VIA MOTO OF METREON, LLC., a Clifornia limited liability company.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Darren Iverson sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $2,023,110.75
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $525.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $2,023,635.75
Judgment signed in open court.
